title: Homemade Sweet Chilli Jam
summary: A savoury jam with a gently hot, red-peppery flavour. Recipe by MOB Contributor Thomas Colson

ingredients.label: 200g Red Chillis (deseed for a milder heat)
ingredients.name: Red Chilli

method.description: Chop your chillies and bell peppers and blend finely in a food processor.
In a large saucepan, add the sugar and vinegar and bring the mixture to the boil.
Add your pepper and chilli mixture to the saucepan and cook for 10 minutes.
Allow your mixture to cool down for at least an hour.
Next, sterilise four jam jars by soaking them in boiling water for 5 minutes.
Add your jam to the jars let cool completely before enjoying.

chefs.name: Mob
chefs.summary: Mob is on a mission to instil a love of cooking in everyone, because we believe in the positive impact that it can have on people's lives.
